# Artifact AI

> AI Registry entry [AIR-25](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-25/artifact-ai) — status **Evaluating** as of 2026-04-02. Departments: finance.

**Category:** ERP / AI-Powered Accounting & Finance
**Cost:** TBC (demo-based pricing)
**Departments:** Finance
**Entity:** Artifact AI Ltd. (UK)

## Overview

AI-powered accounting/finance platform that automates end-to-end financial workflows. Sits on top of existing GL software — no rip-and-replace required. Target: accounting firms, finance departments (controllers, CFOs).

## Core Capabilities

* AI-powered bookkeeping with confidence scores
* Transaction ingestion — real-time categorisation
* Bank & balance sheet reconciliation
* Month-end close automation (case study: 67% reduction)
* Invoice & tax automation
* Prepayment tracking, fixed asset management
* Exception routing to human reviewers
* Full audit trail

## Products

* **Arti** — Core AI assistant
* **Omni** — AI lab integrating models, databases, tools, systems

## Integrations

* GL/ERP: QuickBooks Online, Xero, Sage, NetSuite
* SSO providers (enterprise)
* Practice management tools

## Security

* SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, ISO certified
* End-to-end encryption
* Regional data residency
* SSO, RBAC, least-privilege

## Why Evaluating (Janus Context)

Bonaventure exploring Xero. Artifact sits on top of Xero (confirmed) to automate invoice processing, reconciliation, month-end close — complements Slack Invoice Bot (AIP-8) and planned Airwallex (AIP-1).

## Key Questions for Ann

1. Meaningful automation on top of Xero native?
2. Multi-currency / multi-entity for 10+ country offices?
3. Pricing model (private)?
4. UK/EU data residency?
5. Data training policy?
6. Compare against [[campfire|Campfire]] ([[campfire|AIR-23]]) and [[rillet|Rillet]] ([[rillet|AIR-24]])?

*Evaluating. Pending Ann's assessment.*
